case_title: COLLECTION BUREAU OF SAN JOSE vs. PEDROCHE, EMILIA

docket_entries.description: COMMON COUNTS/OPEN BOOK ACCOUNT/COLLECTIONS, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF COLLECTION BUREAU OF SAN JOSE A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION AS TO DEFENDANT PEDROCHE, EMILIA SUMMONS ISSUED STATUS CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR          DEC-11-1992
